hero.subtitle: 🚀 Software Engineer · Passionate about building unique and memorable digital experiences.
hero.marquee: ✨ · Juan David Ramírez · Software Engineer · Passionate about technology 🚀

about.title: JuanDa
about.tagline: I build digital experiences that solve real problems.
about.description: I'm a full-stack developer passionate about technology, design and building things that truly matter. Beyond code, I'm naturally curious, love challenges and believe the best technology is born from understanding people first.
about.facet1_desc: Specialized in React, TypeScript and Node.js. I'm passionate about clean architecture, performance and building interfaces that users love.
about.facet2_desc: Curious, empathetic and hungry to learn. I believe communication and humility are just as important as any technical skill.
about.facet3_desc: Music, visual design, video games and coffee. I find inspiration everywhere and it shows in every project I build.
about.facet4_desc: Clean code, teamwork, quality delivery and always seeking the most elegant solution to the most complex problem.
about.facet5_desc: There's always something new to master. I keep up with the latest trends and enjoy experimenting with emerging technologies.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the projects I've worked on

1.title: MiPlante
1.description: Credit system for purchases based on socioeconomic level and customer type.

2.title: Contento V2
2.description: Platform to boost e-commerce with store customization, categories, brands, and product management for professional selling.

3.title: AI Interview System
3.description: Interview platform where AI evaluates programming skills and multiple-choice knowledge, and allows creating interviews by area.

4.title: AI Canvas Board
4.description: Smart board that turns a goal or task into a starting plan, organizing routines and prioritizing activities.

5.title: AI Clinical ERP
5.description: ERP for a renowned clinic, focused on automating obsolete processes and optimizing them with artificial intelligence.

6.title: New Portfolio
6.description: Modern personal portfolio with language switching, advanced animations, and a polished interactive experience.

7.title: Athlete Portfolio Platform
7.description: LinkedIn-style platform for athletes where they can showcase skills, achievements, and their sports profile. Currently in development.

8.title: DropiAdmin
8.description: Project to help users validate whether an order is viable for Dropi sales, track shipping guides, and send user notifications.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey
experience.exp1_desc: Completed my professional internship in the technology area, collaborating on software development tasks and supporting internal platforms. Worked with modern frameworks, modular architecture and team-based development practices.
experience.exp2_desc: Participated in the development of web applications, contributing to both frontend and backend components. Focused on building functional interfaces, integrating APIs and improving application structure.
experience.exp3_title: Technology Support & Systems Assistant — Colegio Talentos Tuluá
experience.exp3_desc: Provided technical support and assisted in technology-related tasks within the institution, helping maintain systems, solving technical issues and supporting digital tools used in academic environments.
